chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 152 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.16. 2. For orders on CMA No.850/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.851/2020. 29.10.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2020 without any progress even notice has not been sought till date. On the last date following order was passed: “04.12.2024 Mr. Dilber Ijaz, Advocate for Applicant. Counsel needs time to fully prepare his brief as he is not well. At his request time allowed. Adjourned.” Today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of the applicant. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
